data.name: EmailAlreadyExists
data.value: A user with this email already exists.

data.name: InvitationAlreadyUsed
data.value: This invitation has already been used or has expired.

data.name: PendingRequestExists
data.value: A pending request already exists for this phone number.

data.name: RequestAlreadyReviewed
data.value: This request has already been reviewed.

data.name: ClientNoLinkedUser
data.value: Client has no linked user account.

data.name: NotPartOfRelationship
data.value: You are not part of this coach-client relationship.

data.name: AlreadyReviewed
data.value: You have already reviewed this relationship. Update your existing review instead.

data.name: CanOnlyUpdateOwnReview
data.value: You can only update your own reviews.

data.name: CanOnlyDeleteOwnReview
data.value: You can only delete your own reviews.

data.name: NotPartOfRelationshipGeneric
data.value: You are not part of this relationship.
